headline: 3 Blue-Chip Stocks Built for a Rotating Market
summary: Investors are rotating out of overvalued mega-cap tech as the broader economy heats up; these three blue-chip stocks are attracting attention

headline: Duke Energy Corporation (DUK) Price Target Raised by $4, Here’s Why
summary: Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) is one of the 10 best stocks to invest in during a recession. On February 11, 2026, Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) saw its price target raised by BMO Capital by $4 to $136. The firm’s analyst James Thalacker kept an Outperform rating on the shares. In the research note, the firm […]
